introSection: Formula Rossa Junior is a steel roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It was manufactured by Zamperla and opened on 1 March 2020 as part of a new family area. It was part of four rides supplied for the new area by Zamperla and is named after the larger Formula Rossa roller coaster.
fullText: Formula Rossa Junior is a steel roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It was manufactured by Zamperla and opened on 1 March 2020 as part of a new family area. It was part of four rides supplied for the new area by Zamperla and is named after the larger Formula Rossa roller coaster.
